title: [Arctic Waters]
description: The area is completely dark, with ominous clouds above making the water below match their sinister hue.  Something can be heard splashing in the ocean not far away.

wayto.20491: ;e if resolve = Spell[9704] and resolve.known? and resolve.affordable? and not resolve.active?; resolve.cast; end; if waterwalking = Spell[112] and waterwalking.known? and waterwalking.affordable? and not waterwalking.active?; waterwalking.cast; end; fput (Spell[112].active? ? 'go southwest' : 'swim southwest')
wayto.20495: ;e if resolve = Spell[9704] and resolve.known? and resolve.affordable? and not resolve.active?; resolve.cast; end; if waterwalking = Spell[112] and waterwalking.known? and waterwalking.affordable? and not waterwalking.active?; waterwalking.cast; end; fput (Spell[112].active? ? 'go northeast' : 'swim northeast')
